name: openclawd
description: OpenClawd monorepo for Solana-native AI agents, payments, MCP tools, and developer surfaces.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:agents && npm run install:router && npm run install:registrar && npm run install:cli && npm run install:hub && npm run install:wallet && npm run install:stack
scripts.lint: npm --prefix clawdrouter run lint --if-present && npm --prefix api-registrar run lint --if-present && npm --prefix clawd-code-cli run lint --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix clawdrouter run typecheck --if-present && npm --prefix api-registrar run typecheck --if-present && npm --prefix clawd-code-cli run typecheck --if-present
